title: lycianthes buchtienii
intro: Lycianthes buchtienii, also known as the Bolivian potato bush, is a perennial plant native to the Andean region of South America. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lycianthes buchtienii include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
